name: ECG (Electrocardiogram)
description: 12-lead ECG to evaluate heart rhythm and electrical activity.

name: 2D Echocardiography
description: Ultrasound imaging of the heart to assess structure and function.

name: Stress Test (TMT)
description: Treadmill test to evaluate cardiac response to physical exertion.
preparation: Wear comfortable shoes. Fast for 3 hours before.

name: Holter Monitoring (24hr)
description: 24-hour continuous ECG monitoring to detect rhythm abnormalities.
preparation: Avoid bathing during the monitoring period.

name: Complete Blood Count (CBC)
description: Blood test measuring red cells, white cells, platelets, hemoglobin.

name: Lipid Profile
description: Measures total cholesterol, LDL, HDL, and triglycerides.
preparation: Fast for 10–12 hours before the test.

name: MRI Brain
description: Detailed imaging of brain structure for neurological assessment.
preparation: Remove all metal objects. Inform if claustrophobic.

name: EEG
description: Records brain electrical activity to diagnose epilepsy and other conditions.
preparation: Wash hair the night before. Avoid caffeine for 12 hours.

name: Full Body Health Package
description: Comprehensive checkup including CBC, lipid profile, blood sugar, thyroid, urine, chest X-ray, ECG, and doctor consultation.
preparation: Fast for 8–10 hours. Bring previous reports.
